scripts.build:html: node scripts/inject-header.js && node scripts/inject-footer.js && node scripts/inject-ga.js
scripts.docs:build: cd docs && npx vitepress build && rm -rf ../public/docs && cp -r .vitepress/dist ../public/docs
scripts.deploy: npm run gate:secrets && npm run gate:syntax && npm run test:gate && npm run gate:i18n && npm run build:html && npm run docs:build && npm run gate:dist && export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && wrangler pages deploy public && npm run gate:smoke
scripts.deploy:dry: npm run gate:secrets && npm run gate:syntax && npm run test:gate && npm run gate:i18n && npm run build:html && npm run docs:build && npm run gate:dist && echo '✅ All gates passed. Ready to deploy.'
